task.title: Renaming a z/OS project
task.shortdesc: Follow these steps to rename a z/OS project.

step.cmd: In the view, select the z/OS project that you want to rename.
Click Rename and type the new project name in the Rename Resource window.

step.stepresult: If the project contains one or more subprojects that are associated with systems that are not connected, a window opens that prompts you to connect to the system. If the user ID and password for the system are saved, this window does not open. uses the saved user ID and password to connect.
